label: Performance tires (UTQG 200+ treadwear)
note: UTQG 200+ treadwear, min 7/32" molded tread depth, and listed in the Tire Guide (§13.3.A). Must fit allowable wheels without fender modification.

label: Aftermarket wheels (stock width, ±1" diameter)
note: Same width as standard, offset within ±7.00mm of stock, diameter ±1" (§13.4). Spacers count as part of the wheel.

label: Wider wheels / any diameter (width per class)
note: Width limits enforced per class via the wheel-width input: EST/AWD-AST/CST 7.5", DST AWD 8.0", most 2WD 9.0", BST 11.0", SST unlimited.

label: Wider 200TW tires than stock allows (width per class)
note: Section-width limits enforced per class via the tire-width input: 225-315mm by class and drivetrain; SST unlimited.

label: R-comp / DOT tires below 200TW (e.g. Hoosier A7)
Aftermarket shocks/struts (stock spring rates & mounting)
note: Street shock rules are more restrictive than ST — verify §13.5 details (count, adjustability limits).

label: Aftermarket anti-roll bar — ONE end only (front OR rear)
Strut bar / tie bar (2-point bolt-on)
note: 2-point bars freely; 3-point substitution rules apply (§14.2.G).

label: Drop-in air filter element
note: Filter element only — no 'cold air' intake kits in Street.

label: Battery replacement (with hold-down)
note: Replacement + supplemental hold-down hardware (§13.9.E). Relocation behind seats is an ST allowance (§14.9).

label: Cold air intake (to throttle body / turbo inlet)
ECU reflash / tune
note: Reprogrammed PCM/ECU OR changed fuel pressure regulator.

label: Limited-slip differential (one)
note: Not allowed in EST except factory viscous units; AWD may replace one diff (SST–DST); GST 2WD only (§14.10.K).

label: Radiator / fan upgrade
note: Core dimensions >= standard, OE mounts, capacity/weight >= standard (§14.10.L).

label: Clutch / lightweight flywheel
note: FULL PREP only — any metal clutch/flywheel (§15.10.O).

label: Standalone ECU / fuel system / ignition replacement
note: Fuel injection systems and carburetors unrestricted (§15.10).

label: Added turbo/supercharger (not factory)
note: Engine/drivetrain systems broadly unrestricted in SM with listed limitations — verify §16.1 details for your combination.

label: Big brake kit / brake lines
note: Rotors equal/larger & ferrous; calipers bolt to standard locations, piston count >= standard (§14.6.A/E).

label: Aftermarket front seat(s)
note: Seat + hardware must weigh >= 25 lb, fully upholstered, OE mounting holes (§14.2.B).

label: Aftermarket steering wheel
note: Replacement for airbag wheel must weigh at least as much as standard assembly (§14.2.D).

label: Driver seat belt / harness
note: Restraints per §3.3.1; seats may not be cut; 2-point harness bar allowed (§13.2.G).

label: Rear seats removed
note: Front seatbacks must remain covered when rear seats are removed (§16.1).

label: Radio/stereo removed
note: FULL PREP only — Limited Prep SP cars keep the radio (§15.2.N).

label: Small spoiler / splitter
note: FULL PREP only; front spoiler/splitter below bumper, no side skirts (§15.2.I).

label: Aero wing
note: Rear deck/hatch behind rear axle centerline, max 8 sq ft total, 2 elements (§16.1.K).

label: Fenders modified/replaced for tire clearance
note: FULL PREP only — fenders/bumpers modified for tire clearance; complete replacement/flares prohibited (§15.2.A).
